message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013, Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12408","justification":"Focuses on German federal election campaign 2013, including evaluations of government, parties and political system during the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2017, Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12961","justification":"Covers public opinion on parties, federal government performance and political institutions during the 2017 Bundestag election in Germany."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in Unified Germany 2012","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11664","justification":"Survey on political attitudes, trust in institutions, parties and government performance in Germany in the early 2010s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in Unified Germany 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12326","justification":"Examines political system support, trust in political institutions and parties in Germany mid-2010s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in Unified Germany 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12719","justification":"Includes items on satisfaction with democracy, evaluations of the federal government and parties in Germany in 2016."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Nationwide survey including modules on political trust, satisfaction with democracy, and evaluation of political institutions in Germany, fielded in 2014."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13238","justification":"Contains questions on political interest, confidence in institutions, parties and government in Germany at the end of the 2010s."},{"title":"Democracy Monitor (Demokratiemonitor) 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13294","justification":"Specifically targets attitudes toward democracy, political institutions and the functioning of government in Germany in 2017."},{"title":"State Election Study Baden-Württemberg 2011","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11378","justification":"State-level election study covering evaluations of state government, parties and political system in Germany in the 2010s."},{"title":"State Election Study Bavaria 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13257","justification":"Includes perceptions of the Bavarian state government, parties and political institutions within Germany’s federal system in the late 2010s."}]}
